price: Er sagte: „Welches Wissen sollte ich darüber haben, was sie zu tun pflegten?
arabic: قَالَ وَمَا عِلۡمِي بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: qāla wamā ʿil'mī bimā kānū yaʿmalūna
